name: CP/M 2.23 SoftCard BIOS (Z-80, $FAB8-$FFFF)
description: Microsoft SoftCard CP/M 2.23 BIOS-internal labels. Companion to cpm_2_2.json (which holds the standard CP/M zero-page and BDOS conventions). These addresses are specific to the 2.23 build and don't apply to other CP/M variants.

0xFAB8.name: BOOT
0xFAB8.comment: BIOS entry 0  -- cold-boot (jumps to NOP-slide landing $FED1)

0xFABB.name: WBOOT
0xFABB.comment: BIOS entry 1  -- warm boot (on SoftCard 2.23: same as BOOT)

0xFAD3.name: SELDSK
0xFAD3.comment: BIOS entry 9  -- select disk (returns DPH pointer)

0xFAD6.name: SETTRK
0xFAD6.comment: BIOS entry 10 -- set track for next read/write

0xFAD9.name: SETSEC
0xFAD9.comment: BIOS entry 11 -- set sector for next read/write

0xFADC.name: SETDMA
0xFADC.comment: BIOS entry 12 -- set DMA buffer address

0xFADF.name: READ
0xFADF.comment: BIOS entry 13 -- read selected sector to DMA

0xFAE2.name: WRITE
0xFAE2.comment: BIOS entry 14 -- write DMA buffer to selected sector

0xFAE5.name: LISTST
0xFAE5.comment: BIOS entry 15 -- LIST status (returns A=0 = not ready)

0xFAE8.name: SECTRAN
0xFAE8.comment: BIOS entry 16 -- sector translation (identity: LD H,B; LD L,C; RET)

0xFED4.name: BIOS_DMA
0xFED4.comment: Current DMA buffer address (set by SETDMA)

0xFD83.name: INIT_PASCAL_1_0
0xFD83.comment: Slot init for Pascal 1.0 firmware (device code 4)

0xFDB0.name: INIT_PASCAL_1_1
0xFDB0.comment: Slot init for Pascal 1.1 firmware -- device code 6, NEW IN 2.23 (the Videx fix)

0xFE81.name: INIT_KEYBOARD
0xFE81.comment: Slot init for keyboard / generic input (device code 3)

0xFB45.name: BIOS_PRINT_C800
0xFB45.comment: Print zero-terminated string at HL via slot firmware -- shared tail of $FB44 JR; CALL into mid-instruction enters at RLCA

0xFED1.name: BOOT_LANDING
0xFED1.comment: BOOT NOP-slide landing -- runtime-generated entry to device-scan

0xF3B8.name: SLOT_INFO_BASE
0xF3B8.comment: Slot-info table for cold-boot generator (F3B8+E = slot E's device code, E=1..7)

0x9C06.name: BDOS_ENTRY_223
0x9C06.comment: BDOS entry point -- planted at $0005-$0007 as JP $9C06

0x9C08.name: BDOS_SENTINEL
0x9C08.comment: First-boot vs warm-boot detect (initialized to $9C; $FB7F-$FB85 checks)
